United States

Federal reform, state legalisation, and the shifting American cannabis economy.

Briefing

The Daily Briefing — 25 May 2026

NORML calls for renewed support in fight for cannabis justice The US advocacy organisation NORML has issued a public appeal for continued support, arguing that the fight for "justice, equity, and

25 MAY 2026 · By TGC · 2 min read
USA

Green Gold Rush: US Medical Cannabis Market on Track to Surpass $45 Billion by 2027, Q1 2026 Report Reveals

Q1 2026 data projects US medical cannabis market to exceed $45 billion by 2027, with record sales but price compression squeezing multi-state operators in mature western states.

15 MAY 2026 · By TGC · 3 min read
USA

First Light in the First State: Delaware Launches Adult-Use Cannabis Sales, Becoming 25th Market

Delaware became the 25th US state to legalise adult-use cannabis sales on 15 April 2026, with three retailers opening under a social equity-focused licensing programme.

1 MAY 2026 · By TGC · 4 min read
USA

Landmark Bipartisan Bill Aims to Expand Medical Cannabis Access for US Veterans

Bipartisan legislation and a $25 million VA funding push could finally allow doctors to recommend medical cannabis to veterans in legal states.

22 APRIL 2026 · By TGC · 3 min read
USA

SAFE Banking Act Revived in US Senate with Bipartisan Push and 280E Reform Amendment

The SAFE Banking Act has been reintroduced in the US Senate with a key Section 280E reform amendment, advancing through committee hearings with bipartisan support.

8 APRIL 2026 · By TGC · 3 min read
USA

FDA Unveils Long-Awaited CBD Regulatory Framework, Sparking Industry Debate

FDA releases March 2026 draft guidance on hemp-derived CBD, proposing a 20 mg daily cap and strict labelling rules for a $4B+ market.

25 MARCH 2026 · By TGC · 3 min read
USA

DEA Cannabis Rescheduling Hearings Begin: Historic Shift Looms as Schedule III Debate Intensifies

DEA hearings in March 2026 weigh historic move of cannabis to Schedule III, with HHS and DEA officials clashing over medical use and public health risks.

10 MARCH 2026 · By TGC · 3 min read

Medical disclaimer: The Ganja Club is an informational publication, not a medical provider. Nothing on this site constitutes medical advice. Always consult a GMC-registered specialist. Medical cannabis has been legal on prescription in the UK since November 2018.
